summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Red Team Framework v6.0 Local-First architecture. All backend APIs (19/19 tests) passed. Frontend loads correctly with v6.0 branding and all 9 tabs functional. Architecture validated: SQLite database, async Job system, polling-based scan status.

minor.issue: MSF RPC shows connected:false (expected - msfrpcd not running in test env)
Sliver shows connected:false (expected - SLIVER_CONFIG_PATH not set)
Config warnings for LISTENER_IP and SLIVER_CONFIG_PATH (expected - optional integrations)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (9/9 tabs render correctly, scan flow works)

seed_data_creation: None required - scans created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v6.0 Local-First features tested and working. Architecture validated: SQLite database at /app/backend/data/redteam.db, async Job system with polling, no MongoDB dependency. MSF RPC and Sliver are OFFLINE as expected (optional integrations). All 9 frontend tabs render correctly: Dashboard, Targets, Attack Graph, Chains, C2, Payloads, AI, Config, Logs. Scan flow tested: start scan returns scan_id AND job_id, polling works, scan completes successfully.

mocked_apis.Security Tools: Simulated - nmap, nikto, etc. return simulated results in test environment

architecture_notes.job_system: Async jobs with polling via GET /api/jobs/{job_id}
architecture_notes.scan_flow: POST /api/scan/start returns scan_id + job_id, poll GET /api/scan/{scan_id}/status
architecture_notes.no_mongodb: MongoDB imports removed, using SQLite repository pattern (db.py)
